parsed.final_response: I can see why you're worried that taking time for reflection might be seen as neglect, and it's great that you want to reassure your mother that this time will actually help you provide better care. One possible approach could be to have an open conversation with your mother about your needs and how this reflection time will help you be a better caregiver. You might say something like, 'I want to make sure I'm doing everything I can to take care of you, and I think taking a little time to reflect on our situation will help me do that.' Would you be open to trying that, and seeing how it feels for both of you?
